features: Charming Retro Design – This pastel measuring cups set from Sass & Belle brings a vintage touch to your kitchen accessories while offering accurate measuring for cooking and baking projects.
Complete Measuring Set – Includes four measuring cups in standard sizes: ¼ cup, ⅓ cup, ½ cup, and 1 cup – perfect for everyday baking and meal preparation.
Perfect for Gifting – A beautiful and practical gift for bakers, this measuring cup set is ideal for housewarmings, birthdays or anyone who loves unique, cute kitchen accessories.
Durable & Easy to Clean – Made from sturdy ceramic with pastel glaze, these measuring cups are long-lasting and easy to clean after use—perfect for hassle-free kitchen experiences.
Sass and Belle Original – Designed by Sass & Belle with their signature playful aesthetic, this small measuring cup set adds charm to your kitchen and complements other Sass & Belle items.
description: Upgrade your kitchen with the Sass & Belle Retro Pastel Measuring Cups Set of 4, a delightful blend of function and style. These ceramic measuring cups are perfect for precise ingredient portioning and add a vintage flair to your kitchen accessories. The set includes four pastel-coloured cups in standard measurements - ¼, ⅓, ½, and 1 cup - making it ideal for both daily cooking and baking adventures. Crafted in Sass and Belle’s signature style, these small measuring cups are as decorative as they are practical. Whether you're measuring flour for cakes or oats for breakfast, this baking measuring cups set delivers both accuracy and charm. Their retro design makes them a standout kitchen accessory, while their durable ceramic build ensures long-lasting use. This set also doubles as a housewarming gift or thoughtful surprise for anyone who enjoys baking, cooking, or simply appreciates beautiful kitchenware. If you're looking for measuring cups for baking, measuring cups and spoons set, or a measuring spoon alternative, this Sass & Belle set ticks every box. Add some playful pastel tones to your kitchen with this measuring cups and spoons set from sass & belle - a must-have for lovers of charming, quirky homeware.
